data.title: Fairchild Gold closes private placement financing, raising C$1.1 million through the issuance of 12,222,777 units at $0.09 each.
data.description: Yesterday in Vancouver, British Columbia, Fairchild Gold Corp. (TSXV: FAIR) successfully closed a non-brokered private placement financing on October 16, 2025. The gross proceeds from this offering totaled C$1,100,047.93. As part of the completion of this financing, the Company issued 12,222,777 units at a price of $0.09 per unit.

data.title: FCPT acquires Heartland Dental property in Oklahoma for $3.3 million. Deal includes triple net lease with 4 years remaining.
data.description: A real estate investment trust, Four Corners Property Trust (NYSE:FCPT), has acquired a Heartland Dental property for $3.3 million. This property, situated in a busy area in Oklahoma, operates under a corporate triple net lease with around four years left on the term. FCPT specializes in owning and acquiring high-quality, net-leased restaurant and retail properties.
Zelenskyy: We trust U.S. and Trump that he wants to finish this war

data.title: Eaton will announce Q3 2025 earnings on November 4, 2025, with a conference call at 11 a.m. Eastern time.
data.description: Eaton, a leading intelligent power management company listed on NYSE under the ticker ETN, is set to release its third quarter financial results for 2025 on Tuesday, November 4, 2025. The report will be made public before the commencement of trading on the New York Stock Exchange. An earnings conference call is scheduled for 11 a.m. Eastern time on the same day to delve into the specifics of the third quarter performance. Interested individuals can join the call through a live webcast available at the dedicated Eaton Third Quarter 2025 Earnings Results link on the company's official website, www.eaton.com.
